title: Limbo
description: A lore-focused technology mod for Basically Content SMP S6
body:
A lore-based technology mod for Basically Content SMP S6.

Adds:

Limbo Petal
Can be thrown at players to give them Paranoia for 3 mins.

Limbo Flower
Spawns very rarely in the overworld, and populates Limbo. Drops 1 Limbo Petal upon breaking.

Limbo
New dimension. There is currently no way to access it in survival.

False Player
Entity. Spawns rarely in dark oak forests. Will occasionaly move around, and will flee from the player if they get too close. Upon player collision, despawns.

Limbo Fuel Bucket.
Item. Crafted using a bucket and 8 Limbo Petals. Can be used to fuel an Uncharged Limbo Synthesizer.

Limbo Synthesizer (Uncharged)
Block. Crafted using an Iron Block, 4 Chains, and 4 Echo Shards. Can be powered by right clicking using a Limbo Fuel Bucket.

Limbo Synthesizer (Charged)
Block. Made by right clicking on an Uncharged Limbo Synthesizer with a Limbo Fuel Bucket. Used to make Limbo Stars.

Limbo Granulate
Item. Crafted using 1 Limbo Petal.

Limbo Residue
Item. Made by smoking Limbo Granulate.

Limbo Star
Item. Made by using Limbo Residue on a Charged Limbo Synthesizer. Can be right clicked to gain Strenth, Speed, and Paranoia for 30 seconds, with a cooldown of 5 mins.

Limbo Tea Edible. Can be consumed for Darkness, Regeneration, Speed, and Weakness for 1 min. Made by using water bottles on a Charged Limbo Synthesizer.

Limbo Artifact Item. No current use. Obtained using a Charged Limbo Engine.

Limbo Engine (Uncharged) Item. Crafted using a Redstone Block, 4 Iron Bars, and 4 Magma Cream. Can be charged by right clicking on a Charged Limbo Synthesizer.

Limbo Engine (Charged) Item. Made by using an Uncharged Limbo Engine on a Charged Limbo Synthesizer. Generates 1 Limbo Artifact every 3 hours when in your inventory. This timer can be lowered using Limbo Accumulation.

Limbo Concentrate Item. Made by cooking Limbo Residue on a campfire.

Limbo Joint Item. Made with 3 Limbo Concentrate and 1 Paper. Can be used once before breaking. Gives Resistance 60 and Slowness 60 for 1 min.
